step_rationale: Glucocorticoid metabolite elevated post-MI; reflects acute-stress cortisol response and HPA axis activation.
mechanism: Cortisol metabolite elevation post-myocardial reperfusion marks systemic stress hormone and inflammatory response.

references.title: Impact of myocardial revascularization surgery on the plasma metabolome.
references.journal: Metabolomics : Official journal of the Metabolomic Society
